---
agent: agent
---
Focus on optimizing UI design and development specifically for mobile and narrow screen devices while ensuring no disruptions or functional regressions on desktop or web platforms.

- Prioritize responsive design techniques targeting mobile and narrow screen layouts.
- Implement visual and interaction adaptations exclusively for mobile screens and narrow widths without altering desktop or web formatting.
- Safeguard desktop and wider web environments by isolating mobile-specific style and layout changes.
- Avoid enabling mobile web access if it compromises desktop performance or UI integrity.
- Document screen-size breakpoints and conditional UI rendering logic to maintain clear platform boundaries.
- Use platform detection or media queries to apply styles or components selectively.
- Validate backward compatibility to keep desktop and web users unaffected by mobile adjustments.
